Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Infrastructure Automation Engineer position at MAS. Your focus on building custom automation tools and React-based frontends for infrastructure management caught my attention. It perfectly matches my background in creating software that simplifies complex workflows.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience with Python and API development can help MAS scale its infrastructure automation.
